title: scyphularia triphylla
intro: Scyphularia triphylla, also known as Triphora, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant is traditionally used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scyphularia triphylla include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Scyphularia triphylla is often prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
